title: .NET 8.0 security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[8.0.121-1.0.1]
- Add support for Oracle Linux

[8.0.121-1]
- Update to .NET SDK 8.0.121 and Runtime 8.0.21
- Resolves: RHEL-116868
full_text:
[8.0.121-1.0.1]
- Add support for Oracle Linux

[8.0.121-1]
- Update to .NET SDK 8.0.121 and Runtime 8.0.21
- Resolves: RHEL-116868
